modelName: D3 Stainless 3-Quart Universal Pan with Lid
description: This professional-grade All-Clad D3 Stainless 3-Quart Universal Pan is a versatile powerhouse for any UK kitchen. This specific variant includes the essential 3-quart pan featuring tri-ply construction with an encapsulated aluminium core for even heat distribution. Included in the box is a precision-fitting stainless steel lid to lock in moisture and heat. Its high, rounded sides make it perfect for sautéing, searing, or simmering sauces. The riveted stainless steel handle ensures a secure grip, while the polished finish offers timeless aesthetic appeal and induction compatibility.
features: 3-ply bonded construction with aluminium core; 18/10 stainless steel interior cooking surface; induction compatible magnetic stainless steel exterior; thermal resistance up to 315°C (oven and grill); 2.8 Litre capacity; rounded sidewalls for efficient whisking and turning.
uses: Searing proteins; simmering sauces; reducing liquids; sautéing vegetables; preparing risottos.

accessories.name: Stainless Steel Lid
accessories.description: Flat stainless steel lid to retain heat and moisture.

name: All-Clad D3 Stainless 3-Quart Universal Pan with Lid
